zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Jackson於1704年4月28日出生在英國藍卡爾利物浦時，她的父親Samuel Jackson23歲，母親Sarah Matthews31歲。她於大約1720年與Reuben Allen在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1751年5月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫莫特 傑克遜享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Jackson于1704年4月28日出生在英国藍卡爾利物浦时，她的父亲Samuel Jackson23岁，母亲Sarah Matthews31岁。她于大约1720年与Reuben Allen在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1751年5月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫莫特 傑克遜享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jackson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

variants.name: Jack
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Jak, Jakke, Jagge, Jake, Jeke, Jegge, a Picard-Flemish denasalized form of Old Picard and Middle Dutch Janke, a pet form of Jan (see John ). It was introduced by Flemings and Picards into Norman and Anglo-Norman usage, whence it became a common English and Scottish pet form of John. Although the surname is mainly Scottish in distribution, it also occurs in England, though the more common form there is Jackson .

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English borrowing of the Old French personal name Jacque(s) (James). However, it is uncertain whether English Jack was ever used as an alternative to James.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Jack (see 1 above) as a surname.

meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Jackson was born on 28 April 1704, in Liverpool, Lancashire, England, her father, Samuel Jackson, was 23 and her mother, Sarah Matthews, was 31. She married Reuben Allen about 1720, in Maryland, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 May 1751, in Mount Jackson, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 47.

Elle a épousé Reuben Allen environ 1720, à Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. ko.lifeSummary: Mary Jackson(이)가 1704년 4월 28일 영국 랭카실르 라이버포에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Jackson(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Matthews(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1720년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주에서 Reuben Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1751년 5월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어 모우트 잭슨에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Jackson nasceu em 28 de abril de 1704, em Liverpool, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Jackson, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Matthews, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Reuben Allen aproximadamente 1720, em Maryland, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1751, em Mount Jackson, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Jackson родилась 28 апреля 1704 г. в местности ливирпул, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Samuel Jackson было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Matthews, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reuben Allen около 1720 г. в местности Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 мая 1751 г. в местности маунт джекксон, дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Jackson nació el 28 de abril de 1704, en Liverpool, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Samuel Jackson, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sarah Matthews, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Reuben Allen aproximadamente 1720, en Maryland, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1751, en Mount Jackson, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 47 años.
